label: 单一家具放置器
description: 根据室内空间网格、已有掩码和主家具清单，将家具按优先级放置到房间中，输出更新后的家具实体掩码、过道掩码和家具编号列表。
description-en: Places furniture into a room grid based on the room layout, existing masks, and a prioritized furniture list; outputs updated body mask, aisle mask, and furniture index.
icon: 扁平插画风格图标。画面为俯视房间平面图，房间内有几件不同颜色的小方块家具整齐排列靠近墙边，中央有一件独立家具，橙色小箭头从家具清单指向房间内对应位置，主色调蓝色和橙色，背景白色，线条简洁。

inputs.name: roomGrid
inputs.label: 室内空间网格
inputs.description: 房间可用区域网格，1=可放置格，0=墙或外部
inputs.description-en: Room interior grid: 1 = walkable cell, 0 = wall or outside.

inputs.name: maskA
inputs.label: 家具实体网格 (maskA)
inputs.description: 家具实体占用网格，无旧家具时传全零网格（来自 room_mask_init）
inputs.description-en: Furniture body occupancy grid; pass all-zero grid when there is no existing furniture.

inputs.name: maskB
inputs.label: 过道预留网格 (maskB)
inputs.description: 过道预留网格，无旧家具时传全零网格（来自 room_mask_init）
inputs.description-en: Aisle reservation grid; pass all-zero grid when there is no existing furniture.

inputs.name: oldFurnitureIndex
inputs.label: 旧家具编号列表
inputs.description: 已放置家具的编号列表，每项含 rank/name/isGroup；无旧家具时传 []
inputs.description-en: Index of already-placed furniture items (rank/name/isGroup); pass empty array if none.

inputs.name: furnitureList
inputs.label: 主家具清单
inputs.description: 待放置的主家具列表（来自 furniture_rank_split 的 main_list），每项含 rank/name/furniture_id/type/placement
inputs.description-en: Main furniture list to place (from furniture_rank_split main_list output), each item with rank/name/furniture_id/type/placement.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 控制家具位置随机性的种子值，相同种子产生相同布局，默认 42
inputs.description-en: Random seed for placement; same seed produces the same layout. Default: 42.

outputs.name: newMaskA
outputs.label: 新家具实体网格
outputs.description: 放置完毕后的家具实体占用网格，非零值为家具的 rank 编号（旧家具保留，新家具编号 = 旧最大 rank + 新 rank）
outputs.description-en: Updated furniture body mask after placement; non-zero values are effective rank numbers.

outputs.name: newMaskB
outputs.label: 新过道预留网格
outputs.description: 放置完毕后的过道预留网格，1=已预留过道
outputs.description-en: Updated aisle reservation mask after placement; 1 = reserved aisle cell.

outputs.name: furnitureIndex
outputs.label: 家具编号列表
outputs.description: 所有家具（旧+新）的编号列表，每项含 rank（网格中存储的编号）、name、isGroup
outputs.description-en: Complete furniture index (old + new), each item containing rank (grid value), name, and isGroup flag.

outputs.name: diagnostics
outputs.label: 诊断日志
outputs.description: 放置过程的诊断信息，含每件家具的放置结果或跳过原因
outputs.description-en: Diagnostic log of the placement process, including result or skip reason for each furniture item.
